name: use-stream
description: Subscribe to a stream of values (SSE, WebSocket, live query) and get a typed AsyncState<T[]> that fills in as events arrive — so a live feed gets the same loading / empty / error handling as a one-shot fetch.

intents: turn a Server-Sent Events or WebSocket feed into a typed AsyncState
accumulate streamed values into a list with loading and error states
subscribe to a realtime channel and re-subscribe on retry
